name: RABBIT-CAGE-20
title: sync-check.sh silent when new skill directories are untracked by git
description: When a new skill directory is created under .claude/features/<feat>/skills/<name>/ and deployed to .claude/skills/<name>/, generate-skills-dir.sh --check returns 0 (no drift) because source and deployed are byte-identical. The sync-check hook therefore never emits the [rabbit] skills-updated alert. New skill directories can sit untracked by git indefinitely with no user notification. Root cause: the drift check compares filesystem content only (sha256 source vs deployed) and has no awareness of git tracking status.

history.note: [skip-vet: fix is self-evident from the hook diff; triage documented in bug description] Extended sync-check.sh to detect untracked skill dirs via git ls-files --others
